arts.ttl: Milan Push to Seal Gimenez Deal, Paving Way for Morata’s Galatasaray Move
arts.sum: AC Milan are stepping up their efforts to finalize the transfer of Santiago Gimenez from Feyenoord, a move that could trigger Alvaro Morata's departure to Galatasaray. The Rossoneri are working diligently with the Dutch club to bring the Mexican striker to Italy. arts.ttl: Leicester City, Sunderland to fight Marseille for 29-year-old Ajax attacker?
arts.sum: Leicester City and Sunderland are reportedly in a race against Marseille for the signature of Ajax striker Chuba Akpom before the end of the winter transfer window.
